excerpt: When one utters this name, does not the heart become pure?…

sections.label: Pallavi
sections.ta:
ஓம் நமச்சிவாய என்று சொல்ல
உள்ளம் தூய்மை அடையும் அன்றோ
sections.translit:
Om namachivAya endru solla
uLLam thUymai adaiyum andrO
sections.en:
When one utters Om Nama Sivaya,
does not the heart become pure?

sections.label: Anupallavi
sections.en:
Blue-throated one, Lord of the dance,
grant me refuge, O primordial one.

notes: Om Nama Sivaya is a Panchakshara mantra, the five-syllable sacred formula of Shaivism. Nataraja is Shiva in his cosmic dance form.
